title: Build CMMC compliance engine (gap assessment, SSP, POA&M, readiness scorer)
description: Build the core compliance engine as described in the MVP spec. Implement: (1) gap assessment questionnaire mapped to 110 NIST SP 800-171 controls across 14 families, (2) automated SSP document generator from assessment responses, (3) POA&M creator for identified gaps with remediation guidance, (4) C3PAO readiness score calculator. Include control family taxonomy data, assessment logic, and document generation templates. Output: source code in products/product-0603/src/engine/
